channel.title: Extracurricular Activities on Tabassum Aktar
channel.description: Recent content in Extracurricular Activities on Tabassum Aktar

item.title: Campus Leader
item.description: Serving as a Campus Leader at Interactive Cares, driving awareness of tech-education initiatives on campus, mentoring peers, and bridging the gap between students and industry-relevant learning resources.

item.title: Campus Volunteer
item.description: Contributing as a Campus Volunteer at ILC, supporting events, outreach programs, and student engagement activities that foster a vibrant and inclusive campus culture.

item.title: Volunteer
item.description: Actively volunteering with ICF, participating in community-driven initiatives and social-impact projects that channel collective effort toward meaningful change.

item.title: Member — Debating Forum
item.description: An active Member of the Debating Forum of IUBAT, sharpening critical-thinking and public-speaking abilities through regular debates, workshops, and inter-university competitions.

item.title: Member — IUBAT Robotics Club
item.description: A dedicated Member of the IUBAT Robotics Club, exploring hands-on robotics projects, collaborating on hardware-software integrations, and staying at the forefront of emerging technologies.
